appliedUpdates.description: Added quote-form state management note documenting required suppressModal/wasUserEdited resets when programmatically changing From/To tokens across chains.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit guidance for when UI changes should include lightweight automated browser smoke tests (e.g., Playwright assertions) in addition to manual validation evidence.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review of `quote-form-ui` found a large JS UI feature (12 expected behaviors) validated only manually; current skill guidance allows this but does not define a threshold for adding automated e2e coverage.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Define a standard location/policy for validation screenshots (e.g., dedicated evidence directory or gitignore rule) instead of accumulating val-*.png artifacts in repository root.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviews of `existing-forms-regression` and `cross-area-quote-flows` both observed repeated root-level validation screenshot commits; repository root already contains many val-*/ui-* PNG artifacts.

rejectedObservations.observation: Near-duplicate token update logic between chain-change handler and setDefaultPair should be extracted into a shared helper.
Validation screenshot root-clutter observation from cross-area-quote-flows review.
